answer:
So, let me tell you about one of my favorite activities I do in my free time—it’s probably hiking. Honestly, I try to get outside and hit the trails at least every weekend, sometimes even more if the weather’s nice or I need to clear my head. You know, there’s something about being out in nature that just resets my mind. I’d say I spend around four to six hours each week hiking, depending on how busy I am.

There are a bunch of reasons why I love it. First of all, it’s a great way to stay active without feeling like I’m working out. Plus, I get to disconnect from screens and soak up some fresh air. It really helps me recharge and destress after a hectic week. On top of that, I get to explore different trails and, honestly, some of the views are absolutely breathtaking. Sometimes I’ll go with friends, and it’s a blast catching up while we walk; other times, I just throw on some music or a podcast and enjoy the peace and quiet.

All in all, hiking gives me a sense of freedom and keeps me balanced, both physically and mentally. It’s a win-win for sure.
title:
Describe a hobby or other activity that you do in your free time. 
What is the hobby or activity? 
How much of your free time do you spend on it? 
What are the benefits you get from doing this activity?

Begin by introducing your hobby:  
"In my free time, I enjoy [name of hobby or activity], which has become an important part of my routine."

Body:
Description of the Hobby:
Explain what the hobby is:  
"[Name of the activity] involves [brief description of the activity]."  
Mention how you got into it:  
"I started doing this because [reason for starting, e.g., curiosity, recommendation from a friend, stress relief]."

Time Spent:
Talk about how often you do it:  
"I usually spend about [amount of time, e.g., a few hours every week/an hour every evening] on this activity."  
"Whenever I have some spare time, I try to [do/practice/engage in] [the hobby/activity]."

Benefits:
Discuss what you gain from this activity:  
"This hobby benefits me in several ways. Firstly, it helps me to [benefit, e.g., relax mentally, improve physical fitness, learn new skills]."  
"Additionally, I find that [another benefit, e.g., it allows me to meet new people/makes me feel more creative/gives me a sense of achievement]."  
"For example, when I [describe a specific moment], I felt [emotion or outcome resulting from the activity]."

Conclusion:
Summarise why the activity is important to you:  
"Overall, I believe that spending time on [your hobby or activity] is worthwhile because it brings me [main benefit]."  
End with a personal reflection:  
"I plan to continue this hobby as long as it keeps giving me [enjoyment/relaxation/opportunities to grow]."","titleTranslate":"描述你在空闲时间做的一项爱好或其他活动。
